ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Quarterback, Running Back) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the player belongs to */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., AFC, NFC) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., East, North) */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league (e.g., NFL) */,
  "commissioner" TEXT /* Commissioner of the league */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team */,
  "score1" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "score2" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game (e.g., sunny, rainy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "passing_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of passing attempts */,
  "passing_completions" INTEGER /* Number of passing completions */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Total passing yards */,
  "rushing_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of rushing attempts */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of touchdowns */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions */,
  "completion_rate" TEXT /* Completion rate (as a decimal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "passing_attempts" INTEGER /* Total passing attempts for the season */,
  "passing_completions" INTEGER /* Total passing completions for the season */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Total passing yards for the season */,
  "rushing_attempts" INTEGER /* Total rushing attempts for the season */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards for the season */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Total touchdowns for the season */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Total interceptions for the season */,
  "completion_rate" TEXT /* Completion rate for the season (as a decimal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2022-2023) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "champion" TEXT /* Name of the champion team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opponent */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., Win, Loss) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, fan) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., coach, analyst, fan) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_player_stats, edit_player_stats) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)
